# Candidate Insights (Auto-Generated)

These are machine-generated starting points for conference narrative curation.
They should be reviewed for domain plausibility before final presentation.

## 1) Wealth-Adjusted Outliers by Indicator

- **Maternal Mortality (per 100K) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Tajikistan** (z=1.87); strongest under-performer is **Sierra Leone** (z=-5.81).
- **Adolescent Fertility Rate (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Burundi** (z=2.60); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-4.16).
- **CO₂ Emissions per Capita (mt) (2014)**: strongest over-performer is **Macao SAR, China** (z=1.96); strongest under-performer is **Qatar** (z=-7.06).
- **Infant Mortality (per 1,000) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Ukraine** (z=1.81); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-4.15).
- **Under-5 Mortality (per 1,000) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Kyrgyz Republic** (z=1.73); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-3.83).
- **Life Expectancy (years) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Vietnam** (z=2.08); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-3.96).
- **Women in Parliament (%) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Rwanda** (z=3.80); strongest under-performer is **Qatar** (z=-1.96).
- **ODA as % of GNI (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Sweden** (z=3.28); strongest under-performer is **United States** (z=-1.43).
- **Trade as % of GDP (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Luxembourg** (z=5.65); strongest under-performer is **United States** (z=-1.82).
- **Measles Immunization (%) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Gambia, The** (z=1.63); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-5.02).
- **Internet Users (%) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Moldova** (z=3.19); strongest under-performer is **Equatorial Guinea** (z=-3.18).
- **TB Incidence (per 100K) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Comoros** (z=1.39); strongest under-performer is **South Africa** (z=-5.32).
- **Undernourishment (%) (2015)**: strongest over-performer is **Mali** (z=2.07); strongest under-performer is **Central African Republic** (z=-3.93).
- **CO₂ Emissions per GDP (2014)**: strongest over-performer is **Macao SAR, China** (z=1.72); strongest under-performer is **Trinidad and Tobago** (z=-5.12).

## 2) Broad Multi-Indicator Leaders and Laggards

Anchor year: **2010** (countries with at least 8 indicators).

Top broad performers:
- Sweden: mean percentile 84.7 across 14 indicators.
- Switzerland: mean percentile 80.5 across 14 indicators.
- Netherlands: mean percentile 79.7 across 14 indicators.
- Iceland: mean percentile 78.9 across 14 indicators.
- Luxembourg: mean percentile 78.6 across 14 indicators.

Bottom broad performers:
- Somalia: mean percentile 16.3 across 9 indicators.
- Central African Republic: mean percentile 19.9 across 13 indicators.
- Sierra Leone: mean percentile 22.9 across 13 indicators.
- Chad: mean percentile 23.0 across 13 indicators.
- Liberia: mean percentile 23.8 across 13 indicators.

## 3) Trend Portfolio Movers (Quality-Adjusted)

Highest share of indicators improving:
- Somalia: 10/10 (100%), median quality change 19.4%.
- United Kingdom: 13/14 (93%), median quality change 25.5%.
- Luxembourg: 13/14 (93%), median quality change 21.4%.
- Denmark: 13/14 (93%), median quality change 7.8%.

## 5) Suggested Next Manual Review

- Validate top/bottom outlier countries against known measurement caveats.
- Select 3-5 final insights with one sentence of caveat each.
- Pair each final insight with one primary chart and one backup chart.
